files.patch:
@@ -442,0 +442,12 @@
+    /**
+     * {@return the square root of the argument}.
+     *
+     * @implSpec
+     * Describe error bounds of the return value.
+     *
+     * @param c the operand
+     */
+    public static ComplexPolarTextbook sqrt(ComplexPolarTextbook c) {
+        return valueOf(Math.sqrt(c.r()), c.theta() * 0.5);
+    }
+
